required_skills: Deep subject-matter expertise in Biology (Botany & Zoology), Physics, or Chemistry at NEET UG level
Thorough knowledge of NEET UG exam pattern, NTA marking scheme, and chapter-wise syllabus weightage
Concept-based teaching methodology for medical entrance preparation at Class 11–12 level
NCERT-focused pedagogy with line-by-line mastery techniques for Biology and standard textbook problems for Physics and Chemistry
Design and administration of NEET-style full-length and subject-wise mock tests
Student performance monitoring and targeted doubt resolution for NEET aspirants
Classroom and online lecture delivery for batches of competitive exam aspirants
Memorization and retention techniques for high-volume Biology content (taxonomy, human physiology, genetics)
preferred_skills: Experience at established NEET coaching institutes (Aakash Institute, Allen Career Institute, Narayana, Sri Chaitanya)
Familiarity with NEET PG preparation nuances for post-graduate medical aspirants
Ability to create high-yield mnemonics, revision charts, and visual aids for complex Biology topics
Online live teaching with digital annotation tools and recorded content creation for EdTech platforms
Analysis of previous years' NEET papers (2010–2024) to predict high-frequency question patterns
Counseling students on MBBS seat allocation, cut-off trends, and state quota admissions
Knowledge of AIIMS, JIPMER, and other medical entrance exam patterns beyond NEET UG
frameworks: Bloom's Taxonomy (applied to NEET question classification)
Spaced Repetition and Active Recall Learning
responsibilities: Deliver in-depth concept lectures in Biology, Physics, or Chemistry strictly aligned with the NEET UG syllabus and NCERT textbook framework
Design and evaluate NEET-pattern mock tests including 180-question full-length tests and chapter-wise subject tests with NTA-accurate marking schemes
Conduct line-by-line NCERT Biology revision sessions to ensure students achieve mastery over the primary source required for NEET success
Resolve student doubts in dedicated doubt-clearing sessions and provide one-on-one academic mentoring for weak-performing aspirants
Develop high-yield revision notes, mnemonics, flowcharts, and quick-reference sheets for high-density Biology and Chemistry topics
Analyze mock test performance data to identify individual and batch-level weak areas and adapt instructional strategies accordingly
Conduct previous-year NEET paper analysis sessions highlighting topic-wise weightage, repeated concepts, and evolving question trends
Create engaging recorded video lectures and digital study content for NEET aspirants on online EdTech platforms
Provide academic counseling to students on MBBS admission cut-offs, state quota strategies, and college selection based on expected ranks
Track student rank progression across test series and implement targeted interventions for students at risk of not qualifying the NEET cut-off
